description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the php:latest Docker image with a mysql:5.7 service and defines MYSQL_DATABASE and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD variables. Add a global before_script that runs apt-get update -yqq, installs a long list of development libraries, executes docker-php-ext-install mbstring mcrypt pdo_pgsql curl json intl gd xml zip bz2 opcache, installs and enables xdebug via pecl, downloads Composer with curl and runs php composer.phar install, and caches the vendor/ directory. Define a test job in the default test stage that runs vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml --coverage-text --colors=never. The pipeline has no explicit artifacts, rules, or deployment targets, relying on the default behavior.
